title: StockGPT results.
author: Beautiful-Town2909
selftext:
In response to a comment on my previous post saying about this tool, here’s some screenshots I took of the stocks that www.stockgpt.pro told me to invest in over the last month or so. You can see the date in all of them, and then the stock ranking, price at the time etc. Results are below:

$MU - $734.97 ➡️ $1065.12 (44.92%) 15 MAY  
$SNDK - $1562 ➡️ $1792 (14.72%) 9 MAY  
$TER - $359.77 ➡️ $410.24 (14.03%) 9 MAY  
$STX - $782.64 ➡️ $947 (21%) 10 MAY  
$CAT - $888.31 ➡️ $929.35 (4.62%) 17 MAY

These are only some of the stocks which it gave me in my portfolio. Another which has done incredibly well, which for some reason I didn’t screenshot, is $WDC. Up something mental like 35%. 

Again, I’d like to point out I’m no expert at all. Far from. I’m just trying to help you all out and show you a tool which is working for me! 

Let me know if you have any more queries.

comments.author: hdstegink
comments.body: I’m very curious what parameters it uses to give stocks the ratings they get. Can you tell me a bit about it?

replies.author: Beautiful-Town2909
replies.body: I couldn’t tell you for definite. I know that it isn’t just momentum based as a fair few of the top ranked stocks have just started to rise significantly. They do have an about page which lists some of their indicators. Both fundamental and technical. Either way, working ridiculously well so far! Promising.
